summary: Completed testing of Centro de Custo filter feature in Export page (Administrativo module). All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly.

issues:
React hydration warning:
cannot be a descendant of

- Badge component nested inside paragraph

passed_tests: 1. Export page shows yellow banner 'Selecione o Centro de Custo para exportar' when no CC selected ✓
2. Export buttons are blocked (opacity-50, pointer-events-none) until CC is selected ✓
3. CC selector button opens modal with 'Todos os Centros de Custo' + registered CCs ✓
4. Selecting 'Todos os Centros de Custo' changes banner to blue ✓
5. Selecting specific CC (Administrativo) changes banner to green ✓
6. After CC selection, export categories become enabled ✓
7. PDF export with centro_custo filter works (HTTP 200) ✓
8. Excel export with centro_custo filter works (HTTP 200) ✓
9. Combined export with centro_custo field works (HTTP 200) ✓
10. GET /api/admin/centros-custo returns list of centros de custo ✓
11. OFX export with centro_custo filter works ✓
critical_code_review_comments: ExportPage.jsx correctly implements CC filter with states: centrosCusto, selectedCentroCusto, ccSelectorOpen
getCentroCustoParam() helper correctly returns null for 'todos' or non-administrativo module
canExport() helper correctly blocks exports until CC is selected in administrativo module
Backend export_pdf, export_excel, export_ofx endpoints accept centro_custo query param
Backend export_combined accepts centro_custo in request body
FINANCIAL_COLLECTIONS filter is applied correctly for contas_pagar and contas_receber
seed_data_creation: Used existing Centro de Custo 'Administrativo' (CC01) from database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Centro de Custo filter feature is fully implemented and working. The filter appears only in Administrativo module's Export page. Yellow banner shows when no CC selected, blue for 'Todos', green for specific CC. Export APIs accept centro_custo parameter to filter contas_pagar and contas_receber collections.

cc_filter_banner.description: Yellow/Blue/Green banner based on CC selection state

states.not_selected: Yellow banner with 'Selecione o Centro de Custo para exportar'
states.todos: Blue banner with 'Exportando: Todos os Centros de Custo'

export_blocking.description: Export buttons blocked until CC selected
